speedrunapi.config.mcsreasymode.option.r: Switches between vanilla Minecraft RNG and Ranked-style RNG adjustments.
speedrunapi.config.mcsreasymode.option.d: Prevents piglins from targeting or attacking.
Prevents ghasts from targeting, attacking, or shooting fireballs.
Prevents hoglins from targeting or attacking.
speedrunapi.config.mcsreasymode.option.m: Moves the pause menu Save and Quit button away from the center stack to reduce misclicks.
speedrunapi.config.mcsreasymode.option.s: Displays keybind labels for hotbar slots and offhand.
speedrunapi.config.mcsreasymode.option.h: Sets where the hotbar hotkey overlay appears.
Sets the hotbar hotkey overlay text size.
Sets the hotbar hotkey overlay background color.
Sets where hotkey labels appear on hotbar slots in inventory and container screens.
Sets the hotkey label text size in inventory and container screens.
Sets the hotkey label background color in inventory and container screens.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.title: RNG Settings
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.iron_golem_drops: Standardizes iron golem drops for village resources.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.eye_breaks.toolt: Keeps the second thrown eye from breaking while leaving other throws vanilla.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.blaze_rods.toolt: Adds blaze rod pity so dry streaks are capped without replacing normal lucky drops.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.piglin_barters.t: Applies ranked barter pity for pearls and obsidian across all piglins.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.piglin_string.to: Applies ranked string pity across all piglins. Disable if you want to practice oneshot.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.flint.tooltip: Guarantees flint after nine failed gravel drops.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.blind_portal.too: Moves the first eligible Nether-to-Overworld blind portal to surface terrain once per world.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.bastion_chest_lo: Uses ranked bastion chest standardization for required iron and obsidian, then returns to vanilla.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.other_chest_loot: Uses ranked custom loot tables for supported non-bastion chests.
mcsreasymode.screen.rng.hoglin_stable_ra: Guarantees two adjacent full-height hoglin stable ramparts while leaving the third rampart vanilla.
